name: Syncro Sender

api_key.how_to_get: Request access through P2P.org Syncro Sender or contact P2P.org via Telegram.
api_key.note: If both private auth headers are present, Authorization: Bearer takes priority.

tip_note: A System Program transfer to one Syncro tip account is required for both public and private endpoints. Public endpoint requires at least 100,000 lamports; private endpoint requires at least 1,000,000 lamports.
cost_on_failure: not explicitly documented; Syncro Sender charges through the tip embedded in the submitted transaction, so the tip is only paid if the transaction lands and executes the tip instruction

private.note: Private endpoint URL and client profile are arranged by P2P.org.

sendTransaction_public.description: Public Syncro Sender transaction submission. No API key; transaction must include a sufficient tip.

sendTransaction_private.description: Private Syncro Sender transaction submission. Requires API key and a sufficient tip.

standard_rpc_private.description: Private endpoints can proxy standard Solana RPC methods when enabled on the client profile.

swqos.description: Transactions are sent directly to validator leaders via staked TPU connections.

read_rpc.private: available only when enabled on the client profile

features.confirmation_tracking: Use a separate standard Solana RPC getSignatureStatuses flow; Syncro Sender handles delivery, not confirmation tracking.

-32600.name: INVALID_REQUEST
-32600.description: Invalid request structure or authentication failure

-32601.name: METHOD_NOT_FOUND
-32601.description: Unsupported method, for example non-sendTransaction on public endpoint

-32602.name: INVALID_PARAMS
-32602.description: Invalid parameters, missing tip, or insufficient tip amount

notes: Transaction bytes should be serialized, signed, and base64 encoded.

retry_strategy.429: Wait for Retry-After seconds, then retry.

best_practices.safe_to_resubmit: Solana transaction signatures are idempotent; submitting the same signed transaction multiple times is safe.

notes: Syncro Sender is a transaction forwarding service; public endpoint is not a general-purpose RPC.
Tips pay for Syncro Sender access; priority fees pay Solana validators for scheduling priority.
A single sendTransaction call already routes through multiple channels, so client-side delivery retries are usually unnecessary unless there is a rate limit, server error, or network error.
The .stack provider label SYNCRON appears to refer to P2P.org Syncro Sender.
